meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding for No-Code Projects
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding flows despite having no coding experience. Master Antigravity and Claude Code for fast, pro results.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no-code' barrier by leveraging AI-assisted development. By integrating Antigravity for UI scaffolding and Claude Code for logic orchestration, you can deploy production-grade user onboarding flows in hours. This modular, repeatable architecture allows you to deliver high-value SaaS features to clients without writing a single line of manual boilerplate.
content.intro:
The client meeting just ended. They want a seamless, interactive user onboarding experience, but your current stack is bogged down by manual configuration and technical debt. You have the vision, but the lack of deep coding experience feels like a glass ceiling preventing you from shipping that premium feature.

Stop wrestling with syntax and start architecting outcomes. By shifting your workflow to an AI-first paradigm, you transform from a struggling builder into a high-velocity product engineer. We are going to bypass the steep learning curve and use modern AI tools to build an onboarding flow that looks like it took a senior dev team weeks to craft.

steps.title: Defining the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, map out your user journey. We use AI to define a JSON schema for our state machine to ensure the onboarding is predictable and modular.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a 4-step user onboarding flow including user profile, preferences, integration setup, and final dashboard tour. Ensure each step includes a 'completed' boolean and 'data_payload' object.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a types.ts file based on the onboarding JSON schema provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Scaffolding the UI Components
steps.description: Generate the visual interface using Antigravity's component library. This ensures your UI is responsive and follows modern design patterns automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React functional component for an onboarding modal using Tailwind CSS. Include forward/back navigation, a progress bar, and input fields for user interests.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a new component file onboarding-modal.tsx and inject the Antigravity-generated code.'

steps.title: Implementing Logic Orchestration
steps.description: Connect the UI to your state management. We use Claude Code to wire up the navigation logic and data persistence layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the state management logic for a multi-step onboarding hook. Use React useState and include a function to update the user profile in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement the useOnboarding hook in hooks/useOnboarding.ts and ensure it handles step transitions correctly.'

steps.title: Adding Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure user progress is saved. We implement an API route that updates user status in your backend once a step is completed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Next.js API route to handle PATCH requests for updating user onboarding progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create pages/api/onboarding/update.ts and add validation for the payload.'

steps.title: Final Integration and Testing
steps.description: Assemble the pieces into your main application flow. We use Claude Code to perform a final audit of the component tree.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a testing checklist for a React onboarding flow to ensure no edge cases exist during user exit or browser refresh.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Perform a code review of the src/components directory and verify all imports are correctly linked.'

pro_tips: Always use 'Atomic Commits' with Claude Code; it makes rolling back specific features much easier if a UI element breaks.
Inject your existing CSS design tokens into Antigravity prompts to ensure the AI-generated code matches your brand identity perfectly.
Use Claude Code's 'search' command to find existing project patterns before generating new components to ensure architectural consistency.
Implement 'optimistic UI updates' in your onboarding flow so the user feels the app is instant, even while the backend processes data.
Store your onboarding steps as an array of objects to make it trivial to add or remove steps later without rewriting the core component logic.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, run an A/B test on the copy in step 2 to maximize conversion rates. Then, move on to implementing automated user email triggers based on the onboarding data collected.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business with AI-assisted workflows. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
